title: Kemah Bob Love Child Work In Progress
description: Kemah's been thinking about her inheritance. Not about money passed down, because there's none of that, but everything else her genes are riddled with. Her last show was chosen as one of the Guardian’s Top 10 Comedy Shows of 2024. Come watch her try to do it again. Kemah Bob is a London based Texas native seen on Richard Osman’s House of Games, Jonathan Ross’ Comedy Club, PLS Like, Fully Blown and Guessable. ‘Bob is a is a great storyteller’ ★★★★ Arts Desk ‘Chest-achingly funny... an exciting glimpse into the future of stand-up, with Kemah Bob at the helm’ ★★★★ Skinny ‘Truly a rising star... utterly charismatic... a delight to witness on stage’ ★★★★ Fest
